title: hiraea costaricensis
intro: Hiraea costaricensis is a plant species native to Costa Rica, belonging to the family Malpighiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity, among others. Hiraea costaricensis is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and is used in traditional medicine to treat conditions like fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
